description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: prepare, build, and test. In the prepare stage add a prepare job that runs ls, pwd, mkdir build, cd build, cmake .. -DDOXYGEN_ENABLE=ON and stores the build directory as a cmake-configured artifact. In the build stage add a luqness job that depends on prepare, runs cd build, ls, make -j4 VERBOSE=1 and publishes the build directory as an executable artifact, and also add a pages job that depends on prepare, runs only on the master branch, executes cd build, make doc, moves doc/html/ to ../public/, and stores the public folder as a documentation artifact. In the test stage add a tests job that depends on luqness, runs cd build/tests, ctest, and cat proj_ns_test.out. Include a before_script that runs whoami, ls, git submodule sync --recursive, and git submodule update --init --recursive for all jobs.
